title: Comforting Light German Pork Dumplings
description: A nostalgic German dish featuring fermented kimchi and desiccated coconut, perfect for a comforting meal. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground pork, desiccated coconut, and chopped ferment kimchi.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the dry ingredients to the pork mixture and mix until just combined.
Gradually add the chicken broth to the mixture, stirring until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and cook in boiling water for 10 minutes.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
